## Project Overview

### Core Information

| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| **Name** | GLOHIB.AI |
| **Type** | AI-Powered Global Health Internship Matching Platform |
| **Architecture** | Microservices (10 services) |
| **Frontend** | Next.js 14 (App Router) |
| **Backend** | Go (Gin) + Python (FastAPI) + Node.js (Express) |
| **Database** | PostgreSQL 16 + pgvector |
| **Caching** | Redis 7 |
| **Storage** | MinIO (S3-compatible) |
| **Containerization** | Docker Compose |

### Purpose

GLOHIB.AI is a 7-stage workflow platform connecting students from Africa/Asia with global health internships at WHO, UNICEF, etc. Features include:
- AI-driven scoring
- Psychomotor tests
- Situational analysis
- Mentorship matching
- Video interviews

---

## Structure Overview

### Directory Tree

```
glohibai/
├── frontend/web/           # Next.js application
│   ├── src/
│   │   ├── app/            # 7 pages (home, login, register, dashboard...)
│   │   ├── components/     # React components
│   │   ├── hooks/          # Custom hooks
│   │   └── lib/            # Utilities, API clients
│   ├── package.json        # 23 dependencies
│   └── tailwind.config.js  # Tailwind CSS config
│
├── services/               # Microservices (10 total)
│   ├── identity-service/   # Go - Authentication
│   ├── student-service/    # Go - Student profiles
│   ├── internship-service/ # Go - Internship listings
│   ├── assessment-service/ # Go - Assessments
│   ├── recommendation-service/ # Python - AI matching
│   ├── scoring-service/    # Python - AI scoring
│   └── video-service/      # Node.js - Video processing
│
├── database/
│   └── migrations/         # 8 migration files
│
├── docker/
│   └── init_postgres.sql   # Database initialization
│
├── docs/
│   ├── discovery/          # 6 due diligence reports
│   ├── status-reports/     # Build status reports
│   └── backups/            # Backup storage
│
├── docker-compose.yml      # Service orchestration
├── package.json            # Root scripts
├── tsconfig.json           # TypeScript config
└── requirements.txt        # Python dependencies
```

## Critical Issues

### Blockers Before UI Refactor

| Issue | Severity | Resolution |
|-------|----------|------------|
| Application services not running | 🔴 High | `docker compose up -d` |
| No test coverage | 🟡 Medium | Add Jest + RTL (post-refactor) |
| Default passwords | 🔴 Critical | Change in .env |
| Missing API keys | 🟡 Medium | Configure OAuth, OpenAI |

### Non-Blockers

| Issue | Severity | Resolution |
|-------|----------|------------|
| No Prettier config | 🟢 Low | Add during refactor |
| Limited ESLint rules | 🟢 Low | Enhance during refactor |
| No accessibility audit | 🟡 Medium | Add axe-core |
| Missing performance monitoring | 🟢 Low | Add Lighthouse CI |

## Recommendations

### Immediate Actions (Before Phase 3)

1. **Start all application services:**
   ```bash
   docker compose up -d
   ```

2. **Change default passwords in .env:**
   ```bash
   POSTGRES_PASSWORD=<secure_password>
   MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD=<secure_password>
   JWT_SECRET=<secure_32_char_secret>
   ```

3. **Create git backup:**
   ```bash
   git checkout -b backup/pre-refactor-20260309
   git push origin backup/pre-refactor-20260309
   ```

4. **Create Phase 3 branch:**
   ```bash
   git checkout -b refactor/ui-ux-2026
   ```

### Phase 3 Priority Tasks

1. **Upgrade core framework:**
   - Next.js 14 → 15
   - Tailwind CSS 3 → 4
   - React 18 → 19 (if compatible)

2. **Install shadcn/ui:**
   ```bash
   npx shadcn-ui@latest init
   ```

3. **Add Radix UI primitives:**
   ```bash
   npm install @radix-ui/react-dialog @radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu
   ```

4. **Implement design tokens:**
   - Create `styles/design-tokens.ts`
   - Define colors, spacing, typography, shadows

5. **Rebuild component architecture:**
   - Primitive components (ui/)
   - Composite components (composite/)
   - Feature components (features/)

6. **Implement animation system:**
   - Page transitions
   - Micro-interactions
   - Scroll animations

7. **Add accessibility features:**
   - Skip links
   - Focus management
   - Reduced motion support
   - ARIA labels

8. **Performance optimization:**
   - Bundle analysis
   - Image optimization
   - Lazy loading

### Post-Refactor Tasks

1. Add comprehensive testing
2. Add visual regression testing
3. Add performance monitoring
4. Add API documentation
5. Add E2E testing
